notes: v2.3.0 — Automatic Updates schedule (configurable day/time, runs apply_update on cron). Apply Update progress modal with auto-reload on server down→up transition. Vault session minted on credential save (no re-auth modal after first save). PM Patches delta sync uses correct QQL (modifiedDate>); falls back to full-list ingest if QQL is rejected. Auto-update toggle no longer 404s. Includes the v2.2 sync robustness, UX, and updater-restart fixes.

steps.comment: Update dependency list FIRST so pip install works
Install dependencies BEFORE replacing code — prevents import errors on reload
Replace entire app/ directory with new code (deps already installed)
Update entrypoint with self-heal logic for next restart
Ensure entrypoint is executable after copy
Update the manifest itself for future updates
Save version SHA and restart Gunicorn workers
